title: Deep Pink Bougainvillea Garland 2PCS Artificial Hanging Flowers 6.6FT Faux Bougainvillea Artificial Vine Flowers for Wedding Arch Centerpieces Table Runner Wall Decorations (Deep Pink)
features: Lush and Vibrant Bougainvillea Floral Garland : Compared to those thin, delicate vines, INSUNSIX bougainvillea flower vines are thick and lush, almost like they're putting on a feast! With no need for watering or sunlight, our bougainvillea artificial flowers require zero maintenance

Size and Quantity: Crafted with silk bougainvillea and faux bougainvillea stems, each garland length is 3.3FT/100CM (packed 2PCS, total 6.6FT/200CM), INSUNSIX bougainvillea artificial garland features lush,stunning and realistic faux bougainvillea blooms in vibrant colors. This artificial flower garland adds a tropical touch to any space, indoors or outdoors

Home and Outdoor Decor: Whether draped over your balcony, patio, or garden fence, these artificial bougainvillea vines are ideal for creating a tropical paradise in your home. The bougainvillea hanging flowers and bougainvillea vines artificial are great for enhancing your outdoor spaces flower garland for backdrop

Versatile Flower Garland for Any Occasion: Great for weddings, parties, or seasonal decor. Great for wedding background wall, table runner, and wedding arch decorations, this bougainvillea garland is a beautiful addition to any event. Use it as a faux bougainvillea outdoor decor piece, or hang the artificial bougainvillea vines as stunning decoration for your special day

Durable and Easy to Use: Fake flower garland made from quality silk bougainvillea and faux bougainvillea flowers, this faux bougainvillea garland is lightweight, flexible, and reusable. With bougainvillea faux flowers that last year-round, you can enjoy the vibrant beauty of bougainvillea hanging flowers for decoration with no hassle
